summary: Iteration 6 — End-to-end verification of the new SonarQube issue detail + assignment workflow (backend + frontend). Backend: 18/18 pytest cases PASS on the preview URL covering list (extended fields), GET detail, POST claim, POST assign, PATCH status incl. 401/400/404 paths. Frontend: full Playwright walk-through on https://infra-preview-3.preview.emergentagent.com confirms issue rows are clickable, IssueDetailSheet opens with title/type/severity/status badges + file path + rule + description + suggested-fix, Claim wires to /claim (status→CLAIMED, assignee→current user, button switches to 'You own this' + disabled), Assign picker assigns to sre1/sre2 (status bumps OPEN→CLAIMED, assignee shown with name + email), status pills CLAIMED/IN_PROGRESS/FIXED/OPEN update the badge, active pill is highlighted+disabled, setting OPEN clears assignee to 'Unassigned', and the underlying issue row in the list refreshes on sheet close (e.g. AYxyz125 row visibly shows CLAIMED + 'admin' handle after closing). Zero console errors and zero page errors during the workflow. Mock state is in-memory (resets on backend restart) as intentional.

issues: Sheet did not always close on Escape key in one out of three test runs (minor flake; the X close button works reliably). Likely focus-related — consider adding onKeyDown handler or ensuring SheetContent has initial focus.

action_items: (Optional / low-priority) Investigate flaky Escape-to-close on IssueDetailSheet — Radix Sheet usually closes on Escape by default; check no parent is calling stopPropagation. The X button works fine.
(Carryover from iter5) server.py is 2158 lines — still monolithic; consider splitting per-domain routers.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py SonarQube section uses an in-process dict (_SQ_ISSUE_STATE) for mutable mock state. This is fine for the mock workflow but is non-thread-safe under uvicorn workers > 1 and resets on restart — main agent has flagged this is intentional.

_create_mock_sonarqube_issues() is called on EVERY GET /api/sonarqube/issues and on every helper invocation (_get_sq_issue_or_404, _apply_sq_state through claim/assign/status which call it up to 4x per request). This is cheap but wasteful — consider building the base list once as a module-level constant.

PATCH /sonarqube/issues/{key}/status accepts case-insensitive status via .upper() but rejects with the un-normalised value in the error message ('Invalid status {body.status}'). Minor UX: show normalised value too.

Frontend IssueDetailSheet swallows axios error details (`catch (e) { toast.error('Failed to ...') }`) — log the underlying error to console for debuggability or surface response.data.detail in the toast.
Frontend IssueDetailSheet listUsers() is called every time the sheet opens for any issue — consider hoisting to CodeQuality page and passing as a prop or caching in a context.

All required data-testid attributes are present and correctly wired (issue-row-{key}, issue-detail-sheet, issue-status-badge, issue-claim-btn, issue-assign-toggle, issue-assign-picker, issue-assign-{handle}, issue-status-{open|claimed|in_progress|fixed}, issue-assignee-value, issue-description, issue-suggested-fix). Excellent testability.
Backend assign endpoint correctly returns 404 for unknown user (not 400) and unknown issue (404) — aligns with spec.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all critical UI flows verified via screenshots + assertions)

test_credentials: admin@triage.ai / admin123, sre1@triage.ai / sre123, sre2@triage.ai / sre123, viewer@triage.ai / viewer123
seed_data_creation: None. SonarQube data is static mock with in-memory mutable overrides (resets on backend restart). All 4 issues (AYxyz123–126) reset to OPEN/unassigned at the end of the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Active workspace flattened to /app/. Supervisor: program:backend (8001), program:frontend (3000). Preview URL: https://infra-preview-3.preview.emergentagent.com. SonarQube issue keys: AYxyz123 (CODE_SMELL/MINOR), AYxyz124 (CODE_SMELL/MINOR), AYxyz125 (CODE_SMELL/INFO), AYxyz126 (BUG/MAJOR). Backend mock state is in-memory only — restart backend (or PATCH status=OPEN) to reset. The pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_sonarqube_workflow.py is the regression suite for these endpoints; it auto-resets issue state before each test via PATCH status=OPEN. Frontend testids are comprehensive and reliable.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional issues found. Only minor observations recorded above.
